PaymentManagerArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the payment manager
PaymentManagerArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the payment manager

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[-a-z]{0,7}:bedrock-agentcore:[a-z0-9-]+:[0-9]{12}:payment-manager/([0-9a-z][-]?){1,48}-[a-z0-9]{10}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

PaymentManagerId.description: The unique identifier for the payment manager
PaymentManagerId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier for the payment manager

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^([0-9a-z][-]?){1,100}-[0-9a-z]{10}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the payment manager

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String
